subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord, and my Hope! This is Thy servant, whom the breezes of Thy love have stirred and whom the rapturous verses have drawn unto Thy beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و ربی و رجائی هذا عبدک الذی حرکته نسائم حبک و جذبات ایات الشغف فی جمالک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
